arts.ttl: Torino step up efforts to sign Chelsea’s Casadei as player agrees to move
arts.sum: Torino's negotiations with Chelsea for midfielder Cesare Casadei are progressing, with the Italian club pushing hard to secure the former Inter Milan player. In a significant development, Casadei has given his approval for the transfer, prioritizing a move to the Serie A side. The post Torino step up efforts to sign Chelsea’s Casadei as player agrees to move appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Cesare Casadei asking price compromise to be found with Torino?
arts.sum: Chelsea and Torino reportedly remain on course to agree a compromise over a fee for midfielder Cesare Casadei over the coming days.

Serie A | Torino v Parma: Match Preview
arts.sum: Torino and Parma will kick off the New Year in a crucial Serie A encounter at the Stadio Olimpico Grande Torino on Sunday afternoon. With only two points separating the two sides in the league standings, both teams will be eager to secure a victory to enhance their positions and move further away from the relegation zone.
